2160070.name: Forge of the Fae
2160070.description:
Join Fiora, a brilliant young inventor, on her quest to uncover the truth behind a series of mysterious disappearances. Step into an enchanting fantasy world brimming with magic, wonder, and danger.

As a miners’ strike spirals into violence, the Mining Company hires mercenaries to crush the unrest. In the chaos, people are vanishing one by one. Tensions rise, but Fiora won’t be deterred from her search for answers.

Explore a world inspired by ancient Celtic folklore, full of intrigue, adventure, and unexpected twists. Meet a diverse cast of characters, each with their own unique playstyle, and stay sharp to outwit your enemies and uncover the truth.

Every decision carries weight and shapes Fiora’s journey.

Upgrade Fiora's loyal Mechanical Faerie and harness the ARC Crystal System to unlock paths, reveal secrets, and channel powerful Fae magic. Your actions ripple through the world, influencing allies, uncovering truths, and guiding the fate of the story.

Immerse yourself in a gorgeous pixel RPG that blends nostalgic charm with modern design. Rich with mystery, choice, and discovery, Forge of the Fae promises an unforgettable adventure.

Modern, dynamic turn-based battles inspired by the classics; designed for today’s players. Forge of the Fae takes the best of old-school JRPG combat and layers on fresh mechanics that keep every battle engaging. Fights are fast-paced and approachable, yet grow into thoughtful, strategic challenges as you face tougher foes and bosses.

Highlights of the Combat System

  • Synergy at its core: Every system connects. Skills, spells, and passives weave together into a cohesive whole, rewarding experimentation and mastery,

  • Combo Abilities: Pair a skill with a spell to unlock powerful new effects,

  • The ARC (Crystal System): Align skills and magic to build your own battle style,

  • Adrenaline Surges: Unleash special abilities that don’t consume turns, adding another layer of strategy,

  • Classic elements, modern flow: Exploit enemy weaknesses with fire, wind, water, earth, nature and arcane magic in quick battles that never feel dated,

The result is a combat experience that’s easy to pick up but deeply rewarding to master, whether you’re reliving your JRPG nostalgia or discovering the genre for the first time!
2160070.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 德语
